item.title: kata-containers / kata-containers
item.description:
Desc: Kata Containers is an open source project and community working to build a standard implementation of lightweight Virtual Machines (VMs) that feel and perform like containers, but provide the workload isolation and security advantages of VMs. https://katacontainers.io/
Lang: Go
Star: 2529
